components.value: V, S, F (a skirt, kilt , or gown)

description.value: A skirt, kilt, or gown you are wearing enables you to control your falls through the air. A creature wearing the enchanted item of clothing falls slowly as if affected by feather fall and can attempt a DC 15 Fly skill check as a move action to hover in place for 1 round.
